chinese_text: 使我介然有知，行於大道，唯施是畏。
translation_text: If I were suddenly to become known, and (put into a position to) conduct (a government) according to the Great Dao, what I should be most afraid of would be a boastful display.
translation_text_raw: If I were suddenly to become known, and (put into a position to) conduct (a government) according to the Great Dao, what I should be most afraid of would be a boastful display.

translation_text: The great Dao (or way) is very level and easy;
translation_text_raw: The great Dao (or way) is very level and easy;

translation_text: Their court(-yards and buildings) shall be well kept, but their fields shall be ill-cultivated, and their granaries very empty.
translation_text_raw: Their court(-yards and buildings) shall be well kept, but their fields shall be ill-cultivated, and their granaries very empty.

chinese_text: 服文綵，帶利劍，厭飲食，財貨有餘；
translation_text: They shall wear elegant and ornamented robes, carry a sharp sword at their girdle, pamper themselves in eating and drinking, and have a superabundance of property and wealth;
translation_text_raw: They shall wear elegant and ornamented robes, carry a sharp sword at their girdle, pamper themselves in eating and drinking, and have a superabundance of property and wealth;

translation_text: - such (princes) may be called robbers and boasters.
translation_text_raw: - such (princes) may be called robbers and boasters.

translation_text: This is contrary to the Dao surely!
translation_text_raw: This is contrary to the Dao surely!
